tasks.description:
Segment: All Users
Prizes by denom:
Same day: X2 Extreme Stamp — cycles 2–4 use Extreme Stamp on Pay + stamp step (cycle 1 unchanged)
Hammers: only in this Rolling (single hammer source this day)

RDS/GGS: cycle 1 — Pay 1 RDS + 1 GGS · step 5 = 2 RDS · step 6 = 1 GGS
Cycles 2–4 — Pay 1 Extreme Stamp + 1 GGS · step 5 = 1 Extreme Stamp · step 6 = 1 GGS
MGAP: denom 3 only · cycles 2–4 · no separate MGAP board row this day
Cycle 1: NO MGAP

Cycle 1:
1 Pay — Coins + Gems + 1 RDS + 1 GGS
2 — 100% SlotoBucks
3 — 4 SNL Dice
4 — 5 Hammers
5 — 2 RDS
6 — 1 GGS

Cycle 2:
1 Pay — Coins + Gems + 1 Extreme Stamp + 1 GGS
2 — 150% SlotoBucks
3 — MGAP — different config (lower)
4 — 8 Hammers
5 — 1 Extreme Stamp
6 — 1 GGS

Cycle 3:
1 Pay — Coins + Gems + 1 Extreme Stamp + 1 GGS
2 — 200% SlotoBucks
3 — MGAP — different config (mid)
4 — 10 Hammers
5 — 1 Extreme Stamp
6 — 1 GGS

Cycle 4:
1 Pay — Coins + Gems + 1 Extreme Stamp + 1 GGS
2 — 300% SlotoBucks
3 — MGAP — different config (higher)
4 — 12 Hammers
5 — 1 Extreme Stamp
6 — 1 GGS

QA: Spin Zone / other offers — hammers only from this Rolling on 11/8.
Pricing: High
Config: Structure reference only: Rolling Offer 6 Cycles - M Price, 2026-05-31 (https://playtika.monday.com/boards/2109172490/pulses/12104594749); do not duplicate until the variant is confirmed. If no exact dated task exists, start from the Rolling Offer template group. Status: Config needed.
